name: Garlic Spinach Balls
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Frozen spinach (cook, drain, and chop)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Form the mixture into small balls and flash freeze them on a baking sheet until solid.
3. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Bake the frozen spinach balls for 20 minutes, turning off the heat when they are golden brown and fully cooked.
5. Serve as is or reheat in the microwave for about 30 seconds before serving.
